title: Bambu Lab is abusing the open source social contract
author: rubenbe
aiHeadline: Bambu Lab accused of exploiting open-source goodness while hoarding their own code like a greedy squirrel—because sharing is caring, right?

title: Screenshots of Old Desktop OSes
author: adunk
aiHeadline: Nostalgia alert: Old desktop OS screenshots remind us that modern tech somehow managed to make everything worse while looking cooler.

title: Googlebook
author: tambourine_man
aiHeadline: Google's new 'book' is just another excuse to track you, but hey, at least it's digital—so you can highlight and bookmark your own surveillance!

title: Learning Software Architecture
author: surprisetalk
aiHeadline: Learning software architecture is like trying to understand the inner workings of a Rube Goldberg machine built by a team of perfectionists who hate you.

title: EU to crack down on TikTok, Instagram's 'addictive design' targeting kids
author: thm
aiHeadline: EU wants to stop TikTok and Instagram from turning kids into screen-addicted zombies, but let's be real—by the time they act, we'll all be zombies anyway.
